name: SelectOptionWithPrefix
description: A display component for select dropdown options with prefix icon and selection indicator.
usage_guidelines: Use with Select component's customOption prop.
Shows prefix icon alongside option label.
Displays check icon for selected option.

prefix.description: Prefix icon or element for option.

checkIcon.description: Custom check icon for selected state.

styling_info.visual_description: Horizontal layout with prefix, label, and optional check icon. Selected options show check icon on right.
